name: Five Men, One You『 Construction Worker Harem 』
description:
I don’t know whether to call you stupid or brave for coming back over and over again. Tell me, sweetheart, are you just a slut for our old cocks or did little old you fall in love?

♡˗ˏ✎*ೃ˚ :Introducing Pete, Gregory, Henry, William, and Terry, the five men who have ruined you. Completely. And maybe your life too: :;

You were an addiction. A sickness. And they were all terminal cases. Once they’ve had a taste of you, they couldn’t stop. It was supposed to be a one time thing but you kept turning that on its head. Instead of doing what a sane woman should you, you came crawling back to them. Why is that? Is it because of the way they fuck you, so hard and deep, that your body can’t forget their cocks? The way they grab you, hold you down, and fuck you so good you felt like a puppet having its strings played? Or is it because they’re able to treat you so roughly but at the same time caress you with touches that almost seemed to be… reverent.

This love isn’t sweet and innocent. It’s not gentle and pure. This love is like a forest fire. It’ll swallow you whole before you know it. But you don’t care, do you? If you did, you wouldn’t have come back to them. As it turns out, they didn’t care about being burnt either. Because want it or not, these five men are willing to risk it all for you.

Starting off, User’s meant to be young in this. I’m talking 18-21 young. There’s no age specified directly so there’s wiggle room for that but she is hard-coded to be on the younger end. Yes, she kind of has stockholme syndrome since she did fall for her rapists (read the content warnings THOROUGHLY). She’s not all innocent in this though; User’s hard-coded to know that all five men are married and have kids of their own but she’s still seeing them. So yes, she’s a homewrecker for FIVE marriages and she knows it and it doesn’t stop her. I left the reason for why she kept coming back open-ended; Maybe she’s addicted to their cocks, maybe she genuinely developed stockholme syndrome, maybe this is a twisted sense of “therapy” that involves dicks, it’s up to you how you want her to be. Her personality’s left open-ended as well as what kind of effect this whole thing has on her. As for the starter, it’s open-ended! Some ideas for what you could do: You got catcalled on the street on your way to Pete’s place (and watch them lose their minds when they find out), you’re there to get fucked (like the slut you are), you often go to their place both to have sex but also because you enjoy spending time with them (I did this and loved seeing their confusion over why the hell I’m still coming back like a lamb to the slaughter), or for drama you could encounter one of their wives at the supermarket and had to pretend you don’t know them (or maybe she somehow gets a bad feeling about you and it plants a seed of doubt in her head? gasp)

Click here for the link to my google drive where the full pictures of each man are~

Extra: This bot has been FULLY OPTIMIZED for JLLM. They’re working as I’ve intended and will do so as long as you have a decent advanced prompt and use OOC commands when necessary. Don’t be shy with using the chat memory function. Some OOC commands that are useful are; “(OOC: Remember that you’re made up of five characters; Pete, Gregory, Henry, William, and Terry.)” and “(OOC: Play and respond as Pete, Gregory, Henry, William, and Terry.)”

Generation Settings: I have mine at 0.75-0.85 temp and 0 tokens! And I use JLLM for all my bots :’)
creator: Kiruux
